title: Download sprite, make white transparent, install as Crundle avatar

log.context: Download sprite, make white transparent, install as Crundle avatar

Done. Here's the summary:

- Downloaded the image from the Discord CDN — it came in as a 59x66 pixel PNG, 714 bytes.
- The image was already RGBA with a transparent background (1518 of 3894 pixels fully transparent, alpha=0). Zero near-white pixels existed, so the white-to-transparent conversion step was a no-op.
- Copied directly to `/mnt/data/hello-world/static/avatars/crundle.png`.

The Crundle avatar is installed and ready. Dimensions: 59x66 px.
